CommunityApplications.Profile:
Apps maintained by **Shakes63**.
**Palisade** — a self-hosted control panel for game dedicated servers (ARK: Survival Ascended and Survival Evolved, Conan Exiles, Palworld, Minecraft Java and Bedrock, Icarus, Valheim, 7 Days to Die, Enshrouded). One lean manager container spawns and supervises a container per game server: schema-driven settings, mod browsers, backups, schedules, live consoles, player administration, and optional pfSense port-forward management.
Support: https://github.com/Shakes63/palisade/issues
